banner.title: This is a library, not a lifeline.
banner.body: A World That Heals shares free educational resources — it does not diagnose, treat, or replace professional care. In an emergency,
footer.disclaimerBody: The information here is for education and navigation only. It is not medical advice, diagnosis, or therapy, and it cannot replace a qualified professional. If you or someone else may be in danger, contact your local emergency services or a crisis line —
footer.meta: 100% free · No ads · No accounts · No tracking. Built on the belief that healing should never be limited by money or access.
